briefdescription.para: CSUDMA destination control offset.
Instance of the Pmc_Dma Device.
Instance of the Pmc_Dma Device.
This function is used to initialize a single Driver instance.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the DMA instance
of the DMA as defined in xparameters.h

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_LOOKUP if DMA driver lookup fails.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_CFG if DMA driver configuration fails.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_SELFTEST if DMA driver self test fails.

briefdescription.para: This function is used set SSS configuration for DMA to DMA.

parameterdescription.para: to select PMC DMA

briefdescription.para: This function is used set SSS configuration for DMA to PZM.
This function is used set SSS configuration for SBI to DMA.

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 Addr, u32 Len, XPmcDma_Channel Channel, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_DmaChXfer

briefdescription.para: This function is used transfer the data on SRC or DST channel.

parameterdescription.para: is address to which data has to be stored
is length of the data in words
is SRC/DST channel selection
to select PMC DMA and DMA Burst type

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_XFER_WAIT if DMA transfer failed to wait.

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 SrcAddr, u64 DestAddr, u32 Len, u32 Flags, XPmcDma **DmaPtrAddr)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_StartDma

briefdescription.para: This function is used initiate the DMA to DMA transfer.

parameterdescription.para: is address for SRC channel to fetch data from
is address for DST channel to store the data
is length of the data in words
to select PMC DMA and DMA Burst type
is to store address to PmcDmaInstance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error codes on failure

briefdescription.para: This function will initialize the DMA driver instances.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure
Initialise PMC_DMA0 & PMC_DMA1.

briefdescription.para: This function returns DMA instance.

parameterdescription.para: is PMC DMA's device ID

listitem.para: PMC DMA instance pointer.
Return the PMC_DMA0 or PMC_DMA1 instance pointer based on the device ID only if they are ready. Otherwise, return NULL.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to wait on non blocking DMA.

parameterdescription.para: to differentiate between PMCDMA_0 and PMCDMA_1

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_NON_BLOCK_DMA_WAIT_DEST if Non Block Dma transfer wait failed in destination channel WaitForDone.
XPLMI_ERR_NON_BLOCK_DMA_WAIT_SRC if Non Block Dma transfer wait failed in source channel WaitForDone.
Configure the DMA source channel.
Wait until the DMA destination channel transfer completes.
Wait until the DMA source channel transfer completes.
Clear the source and destination channel done interrupt bits.
Reconfigure the DMA source and destination channel.

briefdescription.para: This function is used set wait on non blocking DMA.

detaileddescription.para: It is called when Src DMA is non blocking.

parameterdescription.para: to differentiate between PMCDMA_0 and PMCDMA_1

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_NON_BLOCK_SRC_DMA_WAIT if Non Block source Dma transfer wait failed.
Configure the DMA source channel.
Wait until the DMA source channel transfer completes.
Clear the source channel done interrupt bits.
Reconfigure the DMA source channel.

briefdescription.para: This function is used set wait on non blocking DMA.

detaileddescription.para: It is called when Dest DMA is non blocking.

parameterdescription.para: to differentiate between PMCDMA_0 and PMCDMA_1

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_NON_BLOCK_DEST_DMA_WAIT if Non Block destination Dma transfer wait failed.
Wait until the DMA destination channel transfer completes.
Clear the source channel done interrupt bits.
Reconfigure the DMA destination channel.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to transfer the data from SBI to DMA.

parameterdescription.para: to which data has to be stored
of the data in words
to select PMC DMA and DMA Burst type

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error codes on failure
Configure the secure stream switch
Transfer the data from SBI to DMA.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to transfer the data from DMA to SBI.

parameterdescription.para: for DMA to fetch data from
of the data in words
to select PMC DMA and DMA Burst type

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error codes on failure
Configure the secure stream switch
Transfer the data from DMA to SBI.

memberdef.argsstring: (u64 SrcAddr, u64 DestAddr, u32 Len, u32 Flags)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_DmaXfr

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initiate and complete the DMA to DMA transfer.

parameterdescription.para: for SRC channel to fetch data from
for DST channel to store the data
of the data in words
to select PMC DMA and DMA Burst type

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_XFER_WAIT_SRC if Dma Xfer failed in Src Channel wait for done.
XPLMI_ERR_DMA_XFER_WAIT_DEST if Dma Xfer failed in Dest Channel wait for done.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to initialize the ECC memory.

parameterdescription.para: is memory address to be initialized
is size of memory to be initialized in bytes

listitem.para: Status of the DMA transfer
Configure the secure stream switch
Configure PZM length in 128bit
Receive the data from destination channel

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Set the memory with a value.

parameterdescription.para: is the address where the val need to be set
is the value that has to be set
is size of memory to be set in words

listitem.para: Status of the DMA transfer

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the memory using PZM and verifies by reading back initialized memory.

parameterdescription.para: Memory address to be initialized
Length of the area to be initialized in bytes

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error codes on failure
Initialize the data
Read and verify the initialized data

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the MaxOutCmds variable.

detaileddescription.para: This is required to support non blocking DMA.

parameterdescription.para: to be set

memberdef.argsstring: (void *const DestPtr, u32 DestLen, u8 Val, u32 Length)
memberdef.name: XPlmi_MemSetBytes

briefdescription.para: This function is used to Set the memory with a value.

detaileddescription.para: If Len is greater than DestLen, then DestPtr is filled with Val till DestLen bytes and is considered as a failure.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer where the val need to be set
is the memory allotted to destination buffer in bytes
is the value that has to be set
is size of memory to be set in bytes

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function can copy the content of memory for both 32 and 64-bit address space.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the destination where content of SrcAddr memory should be copied.
is the address of the source where copy should start from.
is size of memory to be copied in bytes.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This is the file which contains PMC DMA interface code for the PLM.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 kc 02/21/2017 Initial release 1.01 bsv 04/18/2019 Added APIs to support non blocking DMA vnsl 04/22/2019 Added API to get DMA instance kc 05/17/2019 Added ECC initiation function using PMC DMA 1.02 bsv 04/04/2020 Code clean up bsv 04/07/2020 Renamed DMA to PMCDMA 1.03 bm 09/02/2020 Add XPlmi_MemSet API bm 09/23/2020 Fix XPlmi_InitNVerifyMem for 64-bit address bsv 09/30/2020 Added parallel DMA support for SBI, JTAG, SMAP and PCIE boot modes bm 10/14/2020 Code clean up td 10/19/2020 MISRA C Fixes 1.04 td 11/23/2020 MISRA C Rule 17.8 Fixes ma 03/24/2021 Reduced minimum digits of time stamp decimals to 3 1.05 td 07/08/2021 Fix doxygen warnings bsv 08/02/2021 Code clean up to reduce size bsv 08/13/2021 Code clean to reduce elf size by optimizing memset APIs bsv 08/15/2021 Removed unwanted goto statements bsv 08/22/2021 Fix bug in XPlmi_MemSetBytes ma 08/30/2021 Added XPlmi_SsitWaitForDmaDone function for SSIT cases 1.06 kpt 10/25/2021 Resolved Divide by Zero exception in XPlmi_MemSet am 11/24/2021 Fixed doxygen warning ma 12/17/2021 Do not check for SSIT errors in XPlmi_SsitWaitForDmaDone function ma 01/17/2022 Enable SLVERR for PMC DMA bm 01/20/2022 Fix compilation warnings in Xil_SMemCpy skd 03/03/2022 Minor bug fix in XPlmi_MemCpy64 1.07 bm 07/06/2022 Refactor versal and versal_net code 1.08 bm 11/07/2022 Clear SSS Cfg Error in SSSCfgSbiDma for Versal Net dd 03/28/2023 Updated doxygen comments ng 03/30/2023 Updated algorithm and return values in doxygen comments 1.09 ng 07/06/2023 Added support for SDT flow am 08/23/2023 Fixed doxygen comment for XPlmi_DmaXfr Len in words ng 01/28/2024 optimized u8 variables mss 03/13/2024 MISRA-C violatiom Rule 17.8 fixed bm 07/15/2024 Fixed Memset logic by using source buffer in PPU RAM obs 01/27/2025 Changed DMA WaitForDone calls to use APIs which support timeout 1.10 vss 02/11/2025 Updated SSS configuration correctly. ma 03/19/2025 Remove clearing the SSS configuration for SBI->DMA1
